picks.quote: So, I'm going Donnie Barbosa to win this fight. I'm going to take her to win this fight by first round submission.
So, I'm going with the dog here... I'm going Jean Paul Leosniani for the upset, and I'm going to take him to win this fight by second round knockout.
So, I'm going to lean Delgado here. You know, there is a path for Bashy with the grappling, but I'm going to say Delgato gets it done. I'll say he gets it done by decision.
So, [snorts] yeah, I'm going Olden Korea here. I think it's a pretty easy match up for him... finish him in the second round by knockout.
I don't I don't really want to pick either one of these guys, but I'm going to take Rodriguez to win this fight, and I'm going to take him to win this fight by first round knockout.
So, yeah, it feels gross, but I'm I'm going Hooper... give me Hooper. One more chance... Hooper by first round submission.
Going Alvin Hines though... I'm going Hines. I'll say Hines by knockout
and I'm I'm going Klein here... give me Klein. Klein by decision.
So, I'm going to go Montes by sub here... I'll say he wins by second round submission in this one.
So, I'm going Christian Larry Duncan to win. I'll take him to win by second round knockout.
and I'm going Drius here for sure... give me Drias by decision.
